scripts.render: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render --props "{\"width\":1080,\"height\":1920}"

scripts.render:fullhd: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render --props "{\"width\":1080,\"height\":1920}"
scripts.render:2k: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render --props "{\"width\":1440,\"height\":2560}"
scripts.render:4k: rimraf node_modules/.cache && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider remotion render --props "{\"width\":2160,\"height\":3840}"
